docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAMBRANO, JANETH
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAMBRANO, JANETH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,172.97 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAMBRANO, JANETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL WRIT OF EXECUTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED (INCLUDES $35.76 CREDIT TO PRINCIPAL INCLUDED ON ORIGINAL WRIT) AS TO DEFENDANT MAMBRANO, JANETH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00- SERVED AUG-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAMBRANO, JANETH
PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT ON 09/26/18 ORDERED DESTROYED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAMBRANO, JANETH $1,144.97 PRINCIPAL, $35.76 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,265.73, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $1144.97 PLUS STATUTORY PREJUDGMENT INTEREST (AND COSTS). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $35.76 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT MAMBRANO, JANETH
